pages.text:
Tuesday we went on a short walk in __[?Middlewood]-[?Postock]__ Green & admired the 1902 cricket [?Pavillion]. Then we set off for home. More rain now.

__Sunday July 25th__
We left home & returned for fan belt & bottle tops for the Master. Peter is bringing the Master to Thorpe & John is bringing his van. We dropped Tinder off at Kennels.

We slept in the van, leaving the bed up all week & eating in The Green House. / the Headlands. When we first arrived we didn't dare go into the house for a day & night because W.B's friend, Dr. Tom, could not distinguish between Covid & a hangover. Seamark allowed no one into the house – Ester was breathfeeding & had not had a vaccination. Jane was at the house celebrating her 90 years. Unfortunately she had 2 falls & after the second one her hip was too painful to walk & she went home early in a taxi. V Brave & smiling, but a sad situation. (Wanda has broken her collar bone)
Thomas & Naomi had to swap half way through the week cos of Austin. But a super Thorpe – no rows.
